input: Amwaambe buzuba anyika aawo nguzu zyakukwela nkozijokela musule kwamahola mache. Ino bantu abanyama bachita biyeni?
Lemba aatala amuntu uuli wamamanino kupona munyika yakayinka kakunyina nguwe.
Panga muntu uulaa chimvwule chakapona mpawo chichita mbuli mweenzinyina uuchita zintu zitali kabotu.
Lemba imeyili kuti utobelezye mubuzyo wamulimo ngowakajisi nsondo zyobile zyainda. Tondeezya luyandisisyo lwako lwachibaka eechi, lumba sikubuzya mibuzyo achiindi chakwe, mpawo kobuzya makani mapya.
Weelede kubamba muswaangano amuntu ngobeleka limwi kuti mubandike kuyaambele kwapulojekiti. Lemba lugwalo lwabulemu lwakulomba chiindi cheelede chamuswaangano mpawo upe twaambo tufwaafwi.
Lemba imeyili kuli mupati wako wakulomba nsandulo aatala a lipooti njowakatumina. Tondeezya luyandisisyo lwako lwakusumpula mulimu wako mpawo ubuzye nzila zimwi.
Lemba imeyili kuli mweendelezi wako wakulomba lulekelelo akaambo kakubula buzuba bwakumanizya mulimo. Amwaambe kaambo kakuchedwa, mpawo amwaambe ntaamu zyanu kuchitila kuti zitachitiki limbi.
Lemba imeyili kuli sikusambala wakatuma zintu zitali kabotu naakuti zyakanyonyooka. Amupandulule kabotu penzi eeli, amupe twaambo toonse, mpawo mulombe kujokezyegwa mali naakuti kubbadalwa.
Wabona kuti kuli mali aatali kabotu aali kubbadelwa lyako lyamwezi amwezi. Lemba imeyili ku dipatimenti iilanganya mali aakubbadela kupandulula penzi eeli akulomba kuti lilulamikwe.
Lemba imeyili kuli kasitoma uuyandwa umulumba akaambo kakuzumanana kwakwe mumakwebo, mpawo ubazibye aatala akusumpula naakuti chipego.
Lemba imeyili ku dipatimenti iilanganya basikuula yakkampani kuti ubambe ntenda njookajisi alugwasyo lwabo. Amwaambe penzi mpawo mwaambe mbomuyanda kuti limanizigwe.
Lemba imeyili yakulomba kujokezyegwa naakuti kuchincha chintu nchowakaula a intaneti. Bikkilizya namba yaoda yako akaambo kakupilusya.
Lemba imeyili kuli mweenzinyokwe ngotanaambuula aawe kwachiindi chilamfu. Kobaambila zyakachitika mubuumi bwako mpawo ubabuzye mbobapona.
Lemba imeyili kulumba umwi wamukwasyi naakuti mweenzinyokwe achipego nchakupede. Amupandulule cakusalazya kaambo ncomulumba cipego alimwi ambomuyanda kucibelesya.
Lemba lugwalo lwa imeyili lwakutamba beenzinyokwe kupobwe ndyobamba. Bikkilizya twaambo tujatikizya buzuba, chiindi, busena, azintu zili zyoonse zyaalubazu.
Lemba imeyili yakulumbaizya mweenzinyokwe naakuti ngobeleka aawe aatala akuzwidilila kwakwe. Amwaambe kubotelwa akaambo kabo mpawo amubape majwi aakubasungwaazya.
Lemba imeyili kuli mweenzinyokwe mupati naakuti wamukwasyi wako kwaabila makani mabotu. Kobaambila twaambo akuti ulimvwa biyeni.
Lemba imeyili kuofesi lyakutambula bana ku yunivesiti kulomba makani aatala apulogilamu imwi. buzya aatala anzila yakulembela, mazuba aakumanizya, azimwi.
Lemba imeyili iizumizyidwe kumubelesi wamfwulumende uujatikizya penzi lyamuchilawu likukatazya. Amwaambe nzyomulibilika, amupe twaambo tugwasya, alimwi amupe nzila zikonzya kugwasya.
Watalika mulimu mupya mpawo uyanda kulizyibya kuli baabo mbomubeleka limwi. Lemba lugwalo lwa email lwakulipandulula mpawo utondeezya lukkomano lwako lwakubeleka antoomwe.
Lemba imeyili kuli sikulemba mulimo wakaindi kulomba kuti abelesye mbuli chitondezyo chakulomba mulimo mupya. Kolibombya kolomba kuzumizigwa mpawo ubalumbe alugwasyo ndobajisi.
Lemba imeyili iitayandiki kuli yooyo uukonzya kuba kasitoma uuzyibya inkamu yako akupa milimu yako. Kotondezya nguzu zyako zipati mpawo upandulule mbokonzya kugwasya makwebo aabo.
Lemba imeyili yakusambala kwaambilizya kutalika kwachintu cheenzu. Bikkilizya twaambo tujatikizya zibeela zyachintu eecho, bubotu bwazyo, azintu zimwi zyakusumpula naa kugwisigwa.
Lemba imeyili yakutobelezya kuli yooyo uukonzya kuula wakatondeezya luyandisisyo muchintu chako. Kobayeezya mpindu mpawo ubaambile kuti ulakonzya kwiingula mibuzyo yoonse.

Lemba imeyili yakusinizya kuti kuli sikulembesya mupya ku lugwalo lwamakani lwakkampani yako. Kobalumbaizya akulilembya, ubaambile ncobeelede kulangila, mpawo ubikkilizye lwiito lwakuchita chimwi chintu.
Lemba imeyili yakusambala kuli kasitoma uuliko kale uupa zintu zimwi nzyakonzya kuyanda kweelana azintu nzyaakaula musyule. Amwaambe kaambo zintu eezyi ncozigwasyilizya kuula kwabo.
Lemba email kuli professor wako kulomba kuti ayungizigwe chiindi chamulimu. Amwaambe bukkale bwanu mpawo mupe chiindi cheelede chakumanizya mulimu.
Lemba imeyili kuli beenzinyokwe mbobeendelezya pulojekiti yakabunga. Amupe milimu, amubike mazuba aakumanizya, mpawo amupe chiindi chakuswaangana kuti mubandike kuyaambele.
Lemba imeyili kuli pulofesa kubuzya aatala azyoolwe zyakuvwuntauzya. Amwaambe nzyomuyanda mpawo mupandulule kaambo nchomuyanda kubeleka ambabo.
Lemba email kuli mufundisi wako wakumbila lulekelelo akaambo kakubula chiiyo akaambo kazintu zitalangilwi. buzya kuti naa kuli makani ngoyelede kujana.
Lemba imeyili kuli yooyo wakali mufundisi naakuti muyiisi wakulomba lulayo lwamulimu. Amupandulule mubufwiifwi bukkale bwanu bwalino mpawo mubuzye busolozi bwakuti inga mwaya kunembo biyeni.
Bamwi basyoma kuti kwiiya a intaneti kulagwasya kwiinda kwiiya kwachiindi, bamwi baamba kuti kwiiya mukkilasi nchintu chipati. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Bamwi bantu basyoma kuti mapenzi aabusena ayelede kumanizyigwa nyika yoonse, bamwi bayeeya kuti ayelede kumanizyigwa kubusena nkobabede. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Bamwi basyoma kuti kujana kweendelana amulimu abuumi nchintu chiyumu mazubaano kwiinda chiindi. Ino ulazuminizya naa kutazuminizya kusikila kuli majwi aaya?
Mumasi miingi, mweelwe waakati-akati wabulemu bwabantu uyaabukomena, mpawo buumi bwabo akunyanyaasya mubili zilimukuyaabuceya. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti kube penzi eeli anzila zikonzya kugwasya?
Bamwi baamba kuti kulingaula banyama kuti kube buvwuntauzi bwabusilisi kulayandika, mpawo bamwi basyoma kuti kweelede kulesyegwa. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Muzisi zyiingi, bakubusi balakatazyigwa kujana milimu. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti kube penzi eeli, alimwi ino ninzila nzi nzyomukonzya kwaamba?
Kuneneya kwaba penzi pati mumasi miingi. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti kube penzi eeli, alimwi ino ninzila nzi zikonzya kutolwa kutegwa limane?
Muminzi mipati minji, kusofwaala kwamuya amaanzi nchintu chipati. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti kube mapenzi aaya, alimwi ino ninzila nzi zikonzya kutolwa kutegwa bukkale oobu bube kabotu?
Bapati biingi tabakwe luzibo lwakubelesya minchina munyika yamazubaano. Ino ntwaambo nzi tupa kuti kube boobo, alimwi ninzi chikonzya kuchitwa kuti kube luzibo lwakubelesya minchina?
Mumasena miingi yamadolopo, bantu batakwe maanda balavula. Ino ntwaambo nzi tupa kuti kube kuyungizigwa ooku, alimwi ino ncinzi cikonzya kucitwa kutegwa penzi eeli licesyegwe?

Kuchincha kwachiimo chamulengalenga kuli amulimu mupati anyika yesu. Ino muyeeya kuti nzintu nzi zipati zipa kuti kube kuchincha kwachiimo chamulengalenga, alimwi ino nzintu nzi zikonzya kuchitika kubusena?
Kuula zintu a intaneti kwaba chintu chidumide muminyaka misyoonto yainda. Ino ntwaambo nzi tupa kuti kube kuchincha ooku, alimwi ino nkugwasya nzi kumakwebo aamucilawo?
Mumasena miingi munyika, mweelwe wabantu babala mabbuku waselemuka loko. Ino ntwaambo nzi tupa kuti kube kucheya ooku, alimwi ino nzintu nzi zikonzya kuchitika kubantu?
Kuvwula kwabantu kwaba penzi pati mumadolopo miingi. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti bantu banji kabavwula, alimwi ino ncinzi cipa kuti bantu kabapona mumadolopo?
Kuswaangana kwanyika yoonse kwaleta bubotu bunji, asi akwalo kuleta ntenda kuli bamwi bantu. Ino nzintu nzi zipa kuti kube kuswaangana kwanyika yoonse, alimwi ino kwajatikizya buti nyika?
Muminyaka misyoonto yainda, kubeleka kule kwaba chintu chidumide. Amubandike bubotu abubi bwakubeleka kule.
Bantu biingi bali mukulonga kuzwa kumyuunzi kuya mumadolopo. Amubandike bubotu abubi bwachintu eechi.
Kusumpuka kwatekkinoloji kwachincha bantu mbobabandika. Ino mbubotu nzi abubyaabi buliko mukusumpuka ooku?
Madolopo miingi alikubikka mali munzila zyakweendela zyabantu boonse kuchitila kuti kutabi kuvwundauka kwamyootokala. Amubandike bubotu abubi bwakubikka mali ooku.
Kujanika kweendeenda kumasi aambi kwayungizyika loko. Amubandike bubotu abubi bwabasikuswaya alimwi amasi aatambula beenzu.
Mumasi amwi, milimo yabanakazi abaalumi ilachincha, mpawo kuli zimwi, milimo yachiindi ilazumanana. Sena mulazumina kuti milimo yabanakazi abaalumi ilachincha? Ino eezi zilaampindu nzi kubantu?
Bamwi basyoma kuti bazyali beelede kuba amukuli wakukomezya bana, bamwi bayeeya kuti fulumende yeelede kuchita lubazu. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Bamwi basyoma kuti nzila zyakuzyibana abantu zilakonzya kugwasya bantu, bamwi bayeeya kuti zilakonzya kuchita zintu zitali kabotu. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Kuswaangana kwanyika yoonse kuletela kusweekelwa kwazilengwa. Ino ulazuminizya naa pe kusikila mpocigolela? Ino ninzila nzi zikonzya kutolwa kutegwa zilengwa zyabantu bamumo zikwabililwe?
Bamwi basyoma kuti zintu zyakuzekaula nchintu chipati mubukkale, bamwi bayeeya kuti nchintu chibotu. Amubandike mizeezo yoonse yobile mpawo mupe muzeezo wanu.
Amwaambe nzila zyakumbele zyakuchita mafwumofwumo oomo zyoonse mozibeleka alikke mpawo zibambidwe kabotu kuti kube kubeleka obotu. Ino mbuyumu-yumu nzi butalangilwi buboola?
Koyeeya kuti ulijisi nguzu zipati zikonzya kukuzumizya kuti ukonzye kwiima kwamaminiti aali kkumi muwoola lyomwe lyomwe. Ino mbuti mbomubikka eezi muzintu nzyomuchita abuzuba?
Lemba aatala abuzuba mubuumi bwamuntu uulibambilide loko uubamba maminiti woonse aabuzuba bwakwe. Ninzi chikonzya kuchitika kuti zintu zyatalika kweenda munzila iiteendelani achiindi?
Panga nzila yakulenga iitalibonyi iikonzya kuchincha milimu yabuzuba abuzuba kuba musobano. Ino milawu nzi, alimwi ino ikukulwaizya biyeni?
Panga makani aajatikizya muntu umwi uusola kuleka cilengwa cibyaabi (mbuli kuciindizya naa kulya zyakulya zinji) kubelesya nzila zitazyibidwe naa zyamasalamuzi.
Yeeya ofesi oomo mubelesi umwi awumwi mwatondezya kulimvwa kuliindene (nkokuti, lukkomano, bukali, bbivwe). Ino bachita biyeni milimu yabuzuba abuzuba amiswaangano?
Amwaambe nzila yakubeleka kule, pesi muciindi chakubeleka kuzwa kunganda, sikusobana ubeleka kuzwa mumasena aasiyene-siyene (mbuli nsumbu zitantamuka naa zisamu zibotu).
Muofesi yamasalamuzi, babelesi babelesya misamu kuti bayungizye kubeleka kwabo mumilimu isiyene-siyene. Ninzi chikonzya kuchitika kuti umwi wanywa musamu uutali kabotu kumulimu uutali kabotu?

App mpya yaamba kuti ilakonzya kweezyanisya 'buzuba bwakubeleka bubotu' kweendelanya azilengwa zyamuntu azintu nzyayanda. Lemba aatala amuntu wakasola, mpawo wakajana kuti nchintu chiyumu kwiinda mbwaakali kulangila.
Koyeeya kukkala mung'anda iikonzya kulisalazya pesi ilijisi 'mizeezo' yayo aatala akuti kusalala kweelede kulibonya biyeni. Ino mapenzi nzi aabuka?
Amwaambe nzila yakuchita milimu yamuŋanda oomo milimu yoonse yaaŋanda moisanduka kuba cisobano chiniini, chizwide zyeelelo, bulumbu, amapenzi aatalangilwi.
Chita nzila yakusanzya yabuzuba abuzuba munyika oomo buzuba abuzuba mobuletela zintu zisesemya, mbuli bulongo buteteete naa zibelesyo zyakusanzya zitali kabotu.
Chiindi choonse nuwacha zizwaato, sokisi lilasweeka, pesi muciindi chakuzimaana, lilainda muchiindi. Lemba aatala azintu zyajanwa eezi.
Chibelesyo chako chakutobelezya buumi bwako chitalika kukupa lulayo lwamuntu omwini, mbuli lwamizeezo. Ino chichincha biyeni nzila zyako zyakuchita zintu, alimwi ino nchintu nzi chisisidwe?

Koyeeya kuti chiindi choonse nuchita zisobano zyakunyanyaasya mubili, ulatolwa kubusena bumbi ooko manguzu aako aakumubili nkwaajatikizya nyika iikuzingulukide. Amwaambe chiindi chomwe chakunyanyaasya mubili.
Lemba aatala amuntu uuchita chizuminano achilenge chamasalamuzi kuti akakatile kuzintu nzyayanda kuzuzikizya. Buzuba abuzuba nibaleka kuchita mulimu, balajana ntenda pesi iitali kabotu pe.
Panga makani aawo kubamba chakulya chabuzuba abuzuba nkokusanduka kuba mulimo wakujika—chimwi achimwi chintu chizwa kunyika yamasalamuzi mpawo chiyanda kweendelezyegwa kabotu.
Amwaambe kweenda kwabuzuba abuzuba mudolopo lyamasalamuzi lizwide zilenge zyamasalamuzi, oomo zyakweendela zyabantu boonse mozibikkilizya nkalaki zyamasalamuzi, zilenge ziuluka, naa milyango.
Mudolopo lyachiindi chilikumbele, nzila yamugwagwa waansi anyika nchintu chizumanana kuchincha. Lemba aatala akweenda kwamuntu umwi kwiinda munzila eeyi iitalangilwi pe.
Chiindi choonse nutanta bbaasi kuya kumulimu, ulajana nzila yiindene yakuunka kumulimu munyika iikozyenye. Ino nkuchincha kuli buti nkowatalika kubona?
Lemba aatala amibandi iitazyibidwe pesi mifwiifwi iichitika mumyootokala yabantu boonse akati kabantu bazwa mumasena aasiyene.
Kweendelezya kweendeenda ninzila iibelesyegwa kapati, asi penzi limwi lipa kuti basikweenzya kabajatikizyidwe aakati kamasena. Amwaambe bantu mbobachita penzi eeli lyabuzuba abuzuba.
Yeeya buyo chiyobwedo chazyakulya chakumbele ooko ma robboti aayendelezyegwa a AI nkwaagwasya basikuula, pesi ajisi mizeezo yabo beni. Ino eezi zijatikizya biyeni kuula?
Lemba aatala akuchita milimu mumusika oomo basambazi mobasambala zintu zyabuzubaa buzuba azyamasalamuzi, mpawo kusambazya takuyandiki mali luzutu pesi kuyandika nzila zyabusongo naa zikozyanyo.
Sandula buzuba bwabuzuba abuzuba bwakuchita milimu kuba mulimo mupati, mpawo kwiima kuli koonse kuli buyumuyumu bulibedelede (nkokuti, kujana zintu zitavwuli kujanika, kumanizya zibalo, azimwi).
Wapegwa mulimo wakuula zintu uutazibinkene, asi maanda aakusambalila ngotuminwa taali mabotu pe—amwi amwi ajisi maseseke ayelede kuyubununwa.
Wapegwa mulongo wazintu zyakuula azintu zitalibonyi kuti ziliwo. Mbuli mboyanduulisisya, ulajana kuti chintu chimwi achimwi nchikozyano chisololela kulichimwi chintu chipati.
Munyika yabusongo bwaatala oomo kulyookezya mokuli kabotu, kopandulula muntu mbwalyookezya masiku kobelesya zibelesyo anzila zyakumbele.
Munyika oomo ziloto mozikonzya kweendelezyegwa kwiinda mukutobela nzila zimwi, amupandulule muntu mbwalibambila kulota kwakwe kulondokede.
Lemba aatala amuntu uuchita zyakuzinzibala kuyeeya mumasena aatazyibidwe pe (nkokuti, atala abwaanda bupati, munsi aalwizi, munkanda mpati) kuti alibikkile maanu musule lyabuzuba bulamfwu.
Amwaambe kumangolezya ngomukkala amunyama wamasalamuzi uukonzya kuchincha chiimo chakwe kuti weendelane abukkale bwamukamwini.
Panga nzila iilibedelede yakulemba zyintu zyakachitika buzuba oobo, kobelesya nzila zibikkila maanu kuziindi ziche zyakulumba, busongo, naa kulijana.
Amwaambe muntu uutakonzyi kufwa pesi uumvwa kuchisa koonse akaambo kakulichisa kwakwe. Ino baliyumya biyeni mubuumi oobu?
Yeeya buyo muntu uujisi munyama uutegwa robboti uulaa AI iisumpukide uutalika kulibambila bube bwakwe azintu nzyayanda.
Muswaangano wakachitilwa aakati kazilenge zyaandeene-andeene kuti kube chizuminano chaluumuno. Ino bazunda biyeni zisinkilizyo zyamwaambo azilengwa?
Lemba aatala anyika yakapangwa amuntu uusumpukide pesi yakalekelezyegwa. Ino ncinzi bantu bapya bakkala mumo ncobajana kujatikizya makanze eeni?
Munyika oomo zintu nzyotuyeeya mozikonzya kubbigwa, amupandulule buumi bwamuntu uubba zintu nzyotuyeeya walo uutalika kutazyiba mbwabede.
Kabunga kabasikuvwuntauzya bakapanga nzila zyakuzuza aakati kazibeela, asi zibeela zyoonse zili muntenda kwiinda zyamamanino. Ninzi chibapa kuti bazumanane?
Kumbele, mulengalenga ulazwide zintu zyakasweeka zyabantu bazwa mujulu bakalubwa chiindi chilamfu. Amwaambe buumi bwamuntu uusofwaazya zintu akati kamatongo aaya.
Mulyango uutazibinkene wakaboneka musyokwe uusololela kubusena bwaba fae. Ino basilweendo bakusaanguna bajana nzi kulubazu lumwi?
Lemba aatala amuntu wakasaina chizuminano amulozi singuzu mpawo lino weelede kuchita mulimu uutakonzeki pe.
Amwaambe munzi oomo mayake woonse amigwagwa mozipona, amizeezo yabo beni ambozilimvwa. Ino bantu bakkala mumo bapona biyeni amaanda aabo?
Mwami naakuti mwana musimbi wamwami wakasinganizigwa kuti asanduke kuba munyama masiku woonse. Beelede kujana nzila yakugwisya kutukila ooku kakutanabajaya.
Muntu ulatalika kulimvwa ziloto zyakwe zibyaabi mubuumi bwini. Chiindi choonse nibabuka, chimwi chibeela chanyika yaziloto ziyoosya chibatobela kusikila mubwini.
Lemba aatala aachibelesyo chabusongo (fooni, laputopu, azimwi) eecho chiba aachintu chibi. Ino mbuti mboikonzya kweendelezya mukamwini?
Mudolopo lisyoonto, zuba lilazimaana mpawo chiindi choonse akati kamasiku. Taakwe uukonzya kuzwa mudolopo, mpawo zilenge zitazyibidwe zyakatalika kuzwa mumudima.
Kabunga kabeenzuma kakajana bbuku lyakaindi lipandulula cilengwa cakwiita leza wakalubwa. Balachita mbuli kuseka—kusikila mane chibeleke.
Sikupanga zidooli ulapanga zidooli zilimbuli buumi, asi nikwakamana kuzimaana kwakwe, zidooli zyakatalika kuchita mbuli kuti zili abuumi, aumwi kajisi makanze mabi.
Kabunga kabasikuvwuntauzya bakajana buvwubi busisidwe butakajatikizyigwa anyika zyaanze kwamyaanda yaminyaka. Ino bachita biyeni abantu aaba?
Amwaambe lweendo lwakuya kubusena bupati bwalwizi, ooko nkobakajana chintu nchobatakali kulangila—munzi wansiku uukwabilidwe azilenge zitazyibidwe.
Munkanda iizwide guwo lyamusenga liyoosya azilenge zisisidwe, basikweendeenda balazundana mumuzundano wamwaka amwaka kuti bajane bulumbu butavwuli kujanika.
Kabunga kabantu bakajatikizyigwa kunsumbu iitazyibidwe yalo iizumanana kuchincha busena bwayo mpawo kusisa maseseke aakaindi.
Kabunga kabasikubba zyintu zyamujulu kabelesya mato aamujulu kwiinda munsumbu zyeenda mumaanzi amuminzi yakujulu kabayandaula lubono luzyibidwe kapati lusisidwe mumakumbi.
Sikuvwuntauzya wakabuka katayeeyi mawoola aali makumi one atutatwe aakainda, mpawo wakajana kuti mbabakali bapati mumulandu mupati. Ino batondezya biyeni kuti tabajisi mulandu?
Ihotela ilaboneka munzila iitazyibidwe mumasena aasiyene-siyene munyika yoonse, pesi buyo masiku. Nikwasika mafwumofwumo, lilazimaana. Ino maseseke aanzi?
Mubusena bwakutondezya zintu zyakuzekaula, zifwanikiso zyakatalika kwaamba maseseke aatala abantu bazilanga. Ino ncinzi chipa kuti kube chintu eechi chigambya?
Lemba aatala adolopo oomo, umwi aumwi, bantu mobazimaana kakunyina citondezyo. Aabo bakasyaala tabayeeyi pe aabo bakasweeka.
Mweenzu uusamide chisoti ulazumanana kulibonya mumasena aasiyene-siyene aamilandu pesi kunyina naboneka kuti ulaswaangene amulandu. Ino mbaani, alimwi ino ncinzi ncobazyi?
Yeeya makani aambi aawo Leonardo da Vinci naakamanizya kubelesya minchina yachiindi. Ninzi chikonzya kuchitika kuti chajanwa mumazubaano?
Lemba aatala asikulemba makani uulemba makani mapati aakachitika chiindi walo wakachincha chakachitika amalipooti omwe.
Amwaambe makani aakabunga kabantu bakakazya muchiindi chabweendelezi bwakudyaaminina mumakani aakaindi, antoomwe amapenzi ngobajana kuti bazumanane kupona.
Bwami bwakali kuyeeyelwa kuti bwakasweeka mumakani aakaindi bwakajanwa alimwi, asi bantu babo tiibakachembaala kwamyaanda yaminyaka. Ino ncinzi cakabacitikila?
Muchiindi chili afwaafwi, maanu alakonzya kuchinchwa kumibili yiindene. Ninzi chikonzya kuchitika aawo umwi nasanduka kuba mubili wakupanga mpawo wayanda kupiluka muchimo chakwe chakusanguna?
Lemba makani aatala abukkale bwabantu oomo muncini mousala buumi bwamuntu. Ninzi chikonzya kuchitika aawo muntu uutakwe zyeelelo zyakulilemeka naakali kukazya bweende bwazintu?
Kabunga kabasayaansi kakajana kuti ziloto nzitondezyo zyamasimpe. Ino eezi zilachincha biyeni kumvwisisisya kwesu kwamizeezo?
Mubuumi bwakumbele, myuuya ilabetekwa kweendelanya akuyeeya kwaluzyalo nkobakasiya. Mutwe wamakani wabona kuti mali yamana.
Kumbele kweendelezyegwa a AI, kusala kwamamanino bantu nkobeelede kuchita nkuyeeya nzi nkobayanda kubamba kukabe kutamani.
Lemba makani aatala akabunga kabasikalumamba bakazwa kumulimu bakazwa mumulimo wamamanino.
Amwaambe zyintu zyakachitika zyamuntu weenda muchiindi walo wakajatikizyigwa munyika iikozyenye aawo zintu zyakachitika chiindi nkozyakachincha.
Yeeya bwami oomo mizeezo yeendelezya zuba. Amwaambe buzuba mubuumi bwamuntu uukkala nkuko.
Panga makani aajatikizya chintu chakaindi, eecho, kuti chajatwa, chitondezya sikuchijisi chiindi chifwiifwi chabuumi bwabo bwakumbele, pesi kwamasekondi aali kkumi luzutu.
Lemba kaano kafwiifwi kuzwa mukubona bwato bwamulengalenga buyanda kuba mweenzinyina pesi bwakajalilidwe anyika iitakwe bantu.
Lemba mubandi aakati ka sikuvwuntauzya amuntu uubamba zigwebenga aabo bali beenzinyina kuzwa kubwana.
Chita mubandi aakati kamuntu uutanta nyenyezi amuntu uuzwa kunze uubandika kubelesya mibala muciindi cakubelesya mabala.
Lemba mubandi aakati kamuntu uupona amuuya uupa lulayo lwabuumi lutalangilwi.
Chita mubandi aakati ka AI asikupanga, aawo AI nkwabuzya makanze aakubako kwayo.
Lemba mubandi akati kababelesi bobile bayanda kugwisya mwami uuyandwa, pesi kabajisi muzeezo wakuti umwi wabo ulaa makanze aasisikide.
Amwaambe nyika oomo bantu mobakkala munsumbu zitanta mujulu, mpawo lubono lulatolwa kwiinda mumabbaluni mapati.
Yeeya dolopo lipati lyaansi anyika libelesya minchina iizwa mumuni. Ino mbuyumuyumu nzi bantu bakkala mumo mbobajana?
Yeeya chisi oomo masalamusi atekkinoloji moziswaangene kabotu. Ino bantu babelesya biyeni manguzu aaya mubuumi bwabo bwabuzuba abuzuba?
Panga nyika oomo busena bulikke bwamaanzi buli lwizi lwamaseseke luzungaana mwezi amwezi, akupa kuti bantu boonse kabalonga lyoonse.
Amwaambe nyika yakamana nyika yalo yakayakulula kuba nyika iitalibonyi kabotu, pesi kiijisi maseseke aakonzya kunyonganya luumuno lwayo.
Lemba chikozyano aawo chiindi chomwe nchochili mbuli muntu mpawo babandika aatala akuzyunguluka kwabuumi.
Panga zibeela zya haiku eezyo zitondezya kuyeeya kwaluyando lwakaluba.
Lemba chitondwezyo chitola sikubala kwiinda muziloto zitali zyachoonzyo, kusanganya bwini amizeezo.
Lemba chitondwezyo chijata lwiimbo amajwi aamudolopo lizwide bantu mbuli kuti nkwiimba.
Yeeya buyo zilengwa leza kaziimba lwiimbo lwakukoona kunyika kakutanaba masiku. Ino mmabala nzi azifwanikiso nzi nzyaakali kunga wabelesya?
Ino kuti mibala yoonse munyika yatalika kuzimaana yomwe yomwe? Amwaambe chikonzya kuchitika kuti kwasyaala buyo mubala omwe.
Panga makani aatala a laibbulali iijisi mabbuku woonse aakalembwa amabbuku woonse aakonzya kulembwa.
Yeeya nyika oomo mizeezo moibikkwa mumabbodela akusambalwa. Ino eezi zilakonzya kuchincha biyeni bukkale bwabantu abukkale?
Ino kuti bantu batalika kuchembaala, kabachembaala mbuli mbobapona kwachiindi chilamfu? Ino eezi inga zyabajatikizya biyeni zilongwe zyabo amuzeezo wachiindi?
